development.description: WirkSam is a digital duty scheduling platform for churches and communities. Organizers create tasks with duty shifts, and volunteers book themselves in — simple, transparent, and reliable.
development.title: How It Works

apiIntegration.description: Browse available duty shifts, book with one click, and manage your commitments from anywhere.
apiIntegration.title: Easy Booking

authentication.description: Your bookings are locked — only you or an admin can change them. No accidental overwrites.
authentication.title: Secure & Reliable

responsiveDesign.description: Works on your phone, tablet, or desktop — manage duties on the go.
responsiveDesign.title: Works Everywhere

items.1: Define duty shifts with date, time, and location
items.2: Set how many volunteers each shift needs
items.4: See who's signed up at a glance

items.0: Browse published tasks and duty shifts
items.1: Book a shift with one click
items.2: See all your bookings in one place
items.4: Get a clear overview of availability

about.subtitle: Learn more about WirkSam and how it helps organize duty schedules.
about.title: About WirkSam

cookieNotice.message: This site uses only essential cookies for authentication and session management. No tracking or analytics cookies are used.

batchShifts.description: Add multiple shift batches to the same task with different schedules, locations, or time ranges.
batchShifts.title: Multi-Batch Shifts

dryRun.description: Before regenerating, see exactly which shifts will be added, removed, or kept — and which bookings would be affected.
dryRun.title: Dry-Run Preview

overrides.description: Need different hours on Saturday? Add schedule overrides for specific dates without changing the rest of the task.
overrides.title: Per-Day Overrides

smartRegeneration.description: When you change a schedule, WirkSam matches existing shifts by date and time — preserving bookings on unchanged shifts.
smartRegeneration.title: Smart Regeneration

dates.description: Select a single date, a continuous date range, or pick specific individual dates. If linked to an event, dates are constrained to the event's timeframe.
dates.title: 2. Choose Dates

details.description: Start by giving your task a name, description, location, and category. Optionally link it to an event like a conference or festival.
details.title: 1. Task Details

preview.description: See a real-time preview of all generated shifts. Click any shift to exclude it before creating. The preview updates live as you adjust settings.
preview.title: 5. Preview & Exclude

publish.description: Created tasks start as drafts. Publish when ready so volunteers can see and book shifts. Add more shift batches later or regenerate shifts without losing existing bookings.
publish.title: 6. Publish & Manage

remainder.description: If the day doesn't divide evenly into shifts, choose what to do with leftover time: drop it, create a shorter final shift, or extend the last shift to fill the gap.
remainder.title: 4. Handle Remainders

schedule.description: Set the daily start and end times, shift duration (15 min to 2 hours), and how many volunteers each shift needs. Add per-date overrides for days with different hours.
schedule.title: 3. Configure Schedule

howItWorks.subtitle: A step-by-step look at how organizers create tasks and generate duty shifts in WirkSam.
howItWorks.title: How Task Creation Works

copyright.content: The content and works on this website are subject to copyright law. Any use beyond the limits of copyright law requires the written consent of the respective author or creator.
copyright.title: Copyright

disclaimer.content: This is a private, non-commercial project for coordinating volunteer duty schedules at church tasks and community service. It is operated by a private individual.
disclaimer.title: Disclaimer

liability.content: The contents of this website have been created with the greatest possible care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the content. As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages under general law (§ 7(1) TMG). However, we are not obligated to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances that indicate illegal activity.
liability.title: Liability for Content

links.content: Our website may contain links to external third-party websites over whose content we have no influence. We therefore cannot accept any liability for this third-party content. The respective provider or operator of the linked pages is always responsible for the content of those pages.
links.title: Liability for Links

impressum.subtitle: Information according to § 5 TMG (German Telemedia Act)
impressum.title: Legal Notice

landing.authNote: Sign in to browse tasks and book your duties

easyToUse.description: Browse tasks, pick a shift, and book — it's that simple. No spreadsheets, no confusion.
easyToUse.title: Easy Booking

fastSecure.description: Your bookings are locked and can't be changed by others. Only you or an admin can cancel.
fastSecure.title: Locked Bookings

scalable.description: Whether it's a small gathering or a large church congress — WirkSam scales with your needs.
scalable.title: Any Task Size

landing.nameExplainer: WirkSam — from German "wirksam" (effective) and "zusammen" (together). Because volunteering works best when we work together.

bookings.description: All your confirmed duties in one place — filter by upcoming, this month, or view all.
bookings.title: My Bookings

dashboard.description: Get a bird's-eye view of your tasks, bookings, and an interactive calendar — all in one place.
dashboard.title: Dashboard

eventDetail.description: See all available duty shifts by day, book with one click, and track availability.
eventDetail.title: Task Detail

events.description: Organize related tasks into events like conferences or festivals for easy management.
events.title: Events

notificationPreferences.description: Fine-tune how you receive notifications — via email, push, or Telegram — for each notification type.
notificationPreferences.title: Notification Settings

notifications.description: Stay informed with real-time notifications for bookings, tasks, and shift changes — right in your dashboard.
notifications.title: Notifications

tasks.description: Browse all duty tasks with inline shift previews, search, and smart filters.
tasks.title: Tasks & Shifts

userManagement.description: Admins can manage users, roles, and approval workflows from a central dashboard.
userManagement.title: User Management

showcase.subtitle: Explore the key features that make duty scheduling effortless.
showcase.title: See WirkSam in Action

landing.subtitle: The volunteer scheduling platform for church tasks and community service. Book your shifts for Pfingsten, Kirchentag, and more — effective together.

changes.description: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. The current version is always available on this page. We encourage you to review it periodically.
changes.title: Changes to This Policy

cookies.description: WirkSam uses only technically necessary cookies for authentication and session management. We do not use tracking cookies or third-party analytics.
cookies.title: Cookies

dataCollected.intro: When you create an account and use WirkSam, we process the following personal data:

items.bookings: Booking data (which duty shifts you signed up for)
items.name: Name (as provided by your Auth0 login)
items.picture: Profile picture (if provided by your login provider)

dataCollected.title: Data We Collect

privacy.intro: We take the protection of your personal data seriously. This privacy policy explains what data we collect when you use WirkSam, how we use it, and what rights you have.

legalBasis.description: We process your data based on Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (performance of a contract) for core account and booking functionality, and Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interest) for security and platform operation. Where we send optional notifications, we rely on your consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR), which you can withdraw at any time in your notification settings.
legalBasis.title: Legal Basis

items.account: To create and manage your user account
items.notifications: To send you notifications about your bookings and tasks (email, push, or Telegram if configured)
items.scheduling: To enable duty scheduling and shift booking
items.security: To ensure the security and proper operation of the platform

retention.description: Your personal data is stored as long as your account is active. If you request account deletion, we will erase your personal data without undue delay, unless we are legally required to retain it.
retention.title: Data Retention

rights.contact: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at the email address listed above. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.
rights.intro: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights:

items.access: Right of access — request a copy of your personal data
items.erasure: Right to erasure — request deletion of your data
items.objection: Right to object — object to processing based on legitimate interest
items.portability: Right to data portability — receive your data in a structured format
items.rectification: Right to rectification — correct inaccurate data
items.restriction: Right to restriction — limit how we process your data

rights.title: Your Rights

auth0.description: We use Auth0 for authentication and login. When you sign in, Auth0 processes your email, name, and profile picture. Auth0 may transfer data to the United States. For details, see the Auth0 privacy policy at auth0.com/privacy.
auth0.title: Auth0 (Okta, Inc.)

email.description: We use Proton Mail to send transactional emails such as booking confirmations and notifications. Proton AG is based in Switzerland and subject to Swiss data protection law. Only your email address and the message content are processed.
email.title: Proton Mail (Proton AG)

privacy.title: Privacy Policy

items.accuracy: You are responsible for keeping your account information accurate and up to date.
items.approval: Account access may require approval by an administrator. We reserve the right to reject or deactivate accounts.
items.registration: You need to create an account via Auth0 to use WirkSam.
items.security: You are responsible for the security of your account credentials.

availability.description: WirkSam is provided as-is, without guarantees of uninterrupted availability. We strive to keep the platform running reliably, but maintenance windows, outages, or changes may occur. We will try to communicate planned downtime in advance.
availability.title: Service Availability

bookings.description: When you book a duty shift, you commit to being available at the scheduled time and place. If you can no longer attend, please cancel your booking as early as possible so the shift can be filled by someone else. Organizers and administrators may cancel or reassign bookings if necessary.
bookings.title: Bookings & Cancellations

changes.description: We may update these terms from time to time. The current version is always available on this page. Continued use of WirkSam after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
changes.title: Changes to These Terms

law.description: These terms are governed by the laws of the Federal Republic of Germany.
law.title: Governing Law

liability.description: WirkSam is a free, volunteer-run project. We are not liable for any damages arising from the use of the platform, including but not limited to missed shifts, scheduling conflicts, or data loss. Use the platform at your own discretion.
liability.title: Limitation of Liability

scope.description: WirkSam is a free, non-commercial platform for coordinating volunteer duty schedules at church tasks and community service. By creating an account and using the platform, you agree to these terms.
scope.title: Scope of Service

termination.description: You can delete your account at any time from your settings page. All your personal data and bookings will be permanently removed. We reserve the right to deactivate or remove accounts that violate these terms.
termination.title: Account Termination

usage.intro: When using WirkSam, you agree to:

items.lawful: Use the platform only for its intended purpose of volunteer duty scheduling.
items.noAbuse: Not attempt to manipulate, overload, or exploit the platform.
items.reliable: Honor your booked duty shifts or cancel in a timely manner if you cannot attend.
items.respectful: Be respectful to other users and organizers.

usage.title: Acceptable Use
